title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date, release notes no wifi [New]
scenario: When viewing the About section in App Settings, clicking Release Notes without WiFi shows an error dialog instead of loading release notes.
steps: Observe the status displayed (should show 'Up to date')
Tap on the Release Notes link
Tap the Ok button to dismiss the dialog
expected: When tapping the Release Notes link without WiFi, the release notes should load gracefully (e.g., show cached content or a friendly offline message).
